site.title: Journey • Brotherhood of Knowledge with Light

intro.title: Essential Journey
intro.p1: Welcome to the ESSENTIAL JOURNEY – Knowledge with Light.
intro.p3: You will answer meaningful questions guided by an AI Guide.
intro.p4: Choose your Guide: Lumen, Zion or Arian.
intro.p5: At the end, you can generate your PDF and SelfieCard.

termos1.title: Essential Journey
termos1.subtitle: NOTICE. Please read these important terms.
termos1.description: By starting, you agree to these terms.
termos1.li2: Your answers are confidential and should be honest.
termos1.li3: Access is personal, protected by two-step verification and valid for 72 hours.
termos1.li4: If interrupted, you may continue from your last saved point within the time limit.
termos1.li5: After activation, you have up to 72 hours to complete the Journey.
termos1.li6: When finished, generate and download your PDF and SelfieCard.
termos1.li7: Download your files immediately after they are generated.
termos1.li8: After delivery, your data will be automatically removed.
termos1.li9: Choose a quiet place and take your time.

termos2.title: Terms of Responsibility
termos2.li1: Your Guide is an AI designed to support reflection through human-centered language.
termos2.li2: This Journey does not provide diagnosis, treatment or clinical advice.
termos2.li3: It does not replace psychological, medical or therapeutic care.
termos2.li4: Professional support may be recommended whenever appropriate.
termos2.li5: Your choices and actions remain your responsibility.
termos2.li6: This Journey offers a symbolic and reflective experience.
termos2.li7: Please communicate with respect, empathy and courtesy.
termos2.li8: Avoid offensive, discriminatory or hateful language.
termos2.li9: The way you speak to your Guide also reflects the way you speak to yourself.
termos2.li10: By continuing, you confirm that you understand and accept these terms.

senha.title: Confirm Your Access
senha.p1: The verification code sent to your email unlocks your Journey.
senha.p2: This is a personal, educational and symbolic experience.
senha.p3: By continuing, you confirm that you have read and accepted the terms.

guia.title: Choose Your Guide
guia.subtitle: Hello, {{nome}}! Choose your guide for the Journey.
guia.p1: To unlock the Guide, enter your name
guia.notice: Hover gently over the buttons to preview each guide’s profile. To confirm your choice, click again or use a double click.
guia.armed: You chose {{guia}}. Click again to confirm.
guia.timeout: Time expired. Select the guide and click again to confirm.
guia.load_error: Unable to load the guides. Please try again later.

zion.descricao: ZION Curious and direct, seeks deep answers with a cosmic vision.

lumen.descricao: LUMEN Warm and reflective, guides with empathy and clarity.

arian.descricao: ARIAN Creative and versatile, inspires with innovative perspectives.

selfie.title: Take Your Photo
selfie.instruction: {nome}, move the phone a little away and position your face. {guia} will guide you.
selfie.error: Could not access the camera. Check permissions.

dados.title: Personal Data
dados.subtitle: Fill in the data to enrich your feedback.
dados.obs: Anything important you wish to share?

block_feedback_waiting: CONGRATULATIONS!!! We have completed {blocoNome}. I am gathering the most precious signals...
We have finished {blocoNome}. Wait a moment while I contemplate this crossing with care...
What a beautiful step we took in {blocoNome}! Now I gather the flames of this stage...
We concluded {blocoNome}. I am observing every thread to return clarity and direction...
Stage completed: {blocoNome}. I now collect the echoes to respond with all the light you shared.

final.title: End of the Journey
final.p1: Your answers have been received with honor by the Brotherhood.
final.p2: You have planted seeds of trust, courage, and light.
final.p3: Keep walking. The journey never ends.
final.p4: Return whenever you need to rekindle your flame.
final.p5: You are the light. You are the change.
final.gathering: The Guide is gathering the flames of your journey...
final.feedbackDone: Final feedback completed. You can now generate the PDF or download the SelfieCard.
final.feedbackError: Could not complete the final guide feedback.
final.selfieDownloadError: Could not download the SelfieCard. Check the console.
final.apiUnavailable: API is not ready. Check if /assets/js/api.js loaded.
final.invalidName: Invalid name. Please confirm your name before generating the PDF.
final.invalidGuide: Guide not identified. Please select Lumen, Zion, or Arian before generating the PDF.
final.noAnswers: No answers found. Complete the questions before generating the PDF.
final.pdfConnectionIssue: Connection issues detected. If it takes too long, the "Retry" button will be enabled.
final.retryReady: The request is taking too long. You can try again.
final.forging: The Guide is forging your parchment...
